originalTitle: Which is the Better Choice for Healthcare Investors? IYH or BBH?
summary: BBH delivered 33.6% returns but swung 39.9% lower; IYH's 100 holdings offer steadier performance with 1.2% dividend yield.
content: BBH delivered 33.6% returns but swung 39.9% lower; IYH's 100 holdings offer steadier performance with 1.2% dividend yield.
chineseTitle: 哪个是医疗保健投资者的更好选择？ IYH 还是 BBH？
chineseSummary: BBH 的回报率为 33.6%，但下跌了 39.9%； IYH 持有的 100 只股票表现更稳定，股息收益率为 1.2%。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
